text: Hello, can you hear me? Can you hear me? Oh. I'm Ethan from Nova Healthcare South Carolina. I'm reaching out regarding a cashback benefit to help with out-of-pocket expenses. Oh man. $10,000. And a gap. Especially during a hospital stay. To see if you qualify for this is confirmed with a yes or no if you're under the age of 55. You may hang up or press pound to review or re-record your message. Do you want a cool reference?
